title: Section 2
content: (1) This Act shall come into force on such day,1 as the Central Government, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoints. 2* * * * *
footnote: 1. 1st July, 1887--see Gazette of India, 1887, Pt. I, p. 307 2. Sub-section (2) rep. by Act 12 of 1891, s. 2 and the First Schedule.
